text:
MECO Engineering Company, Inc. (MECO) is pleased to present qualifications to the City of Macon, MO for professional engineering services related to Airfield Development Projects.

OUR FIRM
MECO Engineering is celebrating its 40th anniversary this year. This long-spanning history has been built on serving municipalities, such as yours, in a vast span of projects with varying needs, requirements, funding, and challenges. We take pride in gaining the majority of our business from repeat, satisfied customers.

MECO currently has seven office locations, with a location conveniently close for all your project needs in Kirksville, MO, a mere 35 miles from the City of Macon. This close proximity, as well as our knowledge of the area and ever-changing regulations, allows us to assure you of our ability to serve the City of Macon, MO in a high-quality, cost-effective manner.

WHY MECO?
MECO specializes in providing local customer service to rural municipalities. MECO has a 40 year track record of partnering with rural municipalities and solving aviation needs throughout the area. We are a trusted advisor to help municipalities navigate large federal funding sources to help provide Capital Improvement Plans for establish a strategic growth path forward.

OUR APPROACH
MECO's "Standard of Care" and "Project Approach" is a team-centric based philosophy to ensure that every step of project scope development and design review fully invests the client in each step of the process. MECO does not believe in an engineer-driven project development process; we see the most value in investing our client input in the process, first and foremost. Our clients will never see MECO force a project or a solution upon them. Our clients will always lead the initiative for developing projects and working with our professional staff to determine the best suited solutions to their needs.

You can rely on MECO and our Project Team to provide the attention to detail, prompt response, and a level of commitment to service, experience, knowledge, and expertise that you require and expect of your Engineering Consultant. We never forget that clients have many choices and options in their selection process for a consulting engineering firm. We would be honored to be selected to serve the City of Macon in this capacity.

YOUR PROJECT
We have multiple cost effective ideas that can help sustain and keep the airport operational for years to come. MECO would be a local partner in expanding the clearance zones of the airfield. Having clear airspace clearance zones is a critical criteria when the FAA determines additional funds. We at MECO could fill that trusted advisor role to help the City of Macon navigate the stringent requirements of the FAA. MECO is an expert in master planning and providing strategic plans to set the airport up for success. The Macon-Fower airport has the ability to do low-cost improvements to help grow and establish safe airways in the area. With local MECO offices operating out of Kirksville and Hannibal we can be onsite at a moments notice provide top notch customer care.

Eldon MO AWOS System Installation – City of Eldon, Eldon, MO
The staff of MECO is very well versed in Airport electrical systems. Below is an installation of an AWOS (Automated Weather Observation System). AWOS provide an immediate resource of the exact weather for pilots in the surrounding 35 nautical mile range. AWOS is one of the best areas small airports can invest to provide safety for the local uncontrolled airspace. AWOS reports current cloud visibility levels, cloud height levels, precipitation levels, and wind direction and speed. MECO's staff is experienced in design and implementing these to all FAA regulations. MECO understands all reporting Notice to Air Missions (NOTAM) for airport construction, obstacle awareness and specialized temporary flight restrictions (TRF).

Runway and Taxiway Rehabilitation – City of Monroe City, Monroe City, MO
MECO engineered and designed all grading, subgrade, bituminous layer of the runway and taxiway. MECO performed core sample test and administered all construction of runway and taxiway to FAA and MODOT Standards. In addition, MECO designed and engineered the runway and taxiway navigational lighting systems. All the lighting system there is all dimmable LED based system and operated through a triggering system through the UNICOM. The navigational light system as well was designed to operated by telephone as well.

MECO Engineering Company, Inc. is registered with the State of Missouri through the Department of Insurance, Financial Institutions and Professional Registration, Division of Professional Registration, Board for Architects, Engineers, Land Surveyors, and Landscape Architects as a Professional Engineering Corporation.

Professional Engineering Corporation – Missouri Corporate License No. 000898, Expires December 31, 2026
Professional Land Surveying Corporation – Missouri Corporate License No. 000186, Expires December 31, 2026

MECO Engineering Company, Inc. is registered in the following states to practice engineering and/or surveying: Arkansas, Illinois, Indiana, Iowa, Missouri, Ohio, South Dakota, Texas.

PRE-QUALIFIED: Missouri Department of Transportation (MoDOT); MoDOT LPA Consultant; Illinois Department of Transportation (IDOT); Illinois Capital Development Board (CDB).
